retrieved_result: Accounting Basics (Explanation) "Sample Transactions #4 - #6Sample Transaction #4The fourth transaction occurs on December 3, when a customer gives Direct Delivery a check for $10 to deliver two parcels on that day. Because of double entry, we know there must be a minimum of two accounts involved—one of the accounts must be debite"
